ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "api_path" TEXT /* API path for the song */,
  "primary_artist" TEXT /* Primary artist of the song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the song lyrics page */,
  "song_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the song */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album name */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  "lyrics" TEXT /* Lyrics of the song */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the song contains explicit content */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Score representing the popularity of the song */,
  "playback_url" TEXT /* URL to the song's audio file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_primary_artist FOREIGN KEY ("primary_artist") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album FOREIGN KEY ("album") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the artist */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the artist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who released the album */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks on the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Overall sentiment polarity score */,
  "anger" REAL /* Score representing anger */,
  "anticipation" REAL /* Score representing anticipation */,
  "disgust" REAL /* Score representing disgust */,
  "fear" REAL /* Score representing fear */,
  "joy" REAL /* Score representing joy */,
  "negative" REAL /* Score representing negative emotions */,
  "positive" REAL /* Score representing positive emotions */,
  "sadness" REAL /* Score representing sadness */,
  "surprise" REAL /* Score representing surprise */,
  "trust" REAL /* Score representing trust */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "dominant_sentiment" TEXT /* The most dominant sentiment category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, regular user) */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* JSON string of user preferences */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "total_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of all songs in the playlist in seconds */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the playlist has been played */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the playlist has been shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the song */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the song (1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Optional comment with the rating */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the rating is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_ratings_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who commented */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the comment is public */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_comments_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song played */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who played the song */,
  "play_date" TEXT /* Date the song was played */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played by the user */,
  "last_played" TEXT /* Date the song was last played by the user */,
  "is_favorited" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the song is favorited by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_history_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song recommended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the song is recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., based on listening history, user preferences) */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* User feedback on the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_recommendations_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the feedback has been resolved */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the user's feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_tags_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)
